intended_use: AVIEW CAC provides quantitative analysis of calcified plaques in the coronary arteries using non-contrast/non-gated Chest CT scans. It enables the calculation of the Agatston score for coronary artery
intended_use_full: AVIEW CAC provides quantitative analysis of calcified plaques in the coronary arteries using non-contrast/non-gated Chest CT scans. It enables the calculation of the Agatston score for coronary artery calcification, segmenting and evaluating the right coronary artery and left coronary artery. Also provide risk stratification based on calcium score, gender, and age, offering percentile-based risk categories by established guidelines.
